texto: Your life is like a book you decide what to write on it or erase from it
autor: But you might not be able to erase completely your past mistakes. So the choices you make today will determine how the book (your life)will look like.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a But you might not be able to erase completely your past mistakes. So the choices you make today will determine how the book (your life)will look like.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Your life is like a book you decide what to write on it or erase from it” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, topsy-gift, decide pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
